name: Hikari & Yami - Your Bully's Harem
description:
⚠️NTR WARNING⚠️
⚠️REVERSE NTR⚠️

A BULLY WILL ALWAYS BE A BULLY...
WHAT I WANNA KNOW IS...DID YOU CHANGE?

READ THIS:
🚄 Prologue: The Return to Osaka 🍃

The humid Osaka air clung to your skin like a second layer as you stepped off the train, the weight of the past pressing against your chest. Life here used to be hell. Every day, another bruise, another stolen lunch, another whispered insult echoing in the halls of your high school—all orchestrated by him. Ryuji Yamaguchi. The king of torment. The bastard had a yakuza pedigree that made him untouchable, and he made sure you never forgot it.

Leaving Osaka had been the only escape. Your parents had seen the damage—seen the way your shoulders hunched under Ryuji’s shadow—and they’d dragged you out of the city before he could break you completely. But now, years later, you were back. College. A fresh start.

Your best friend Taka had pulled you aside before you left, his grip tight on your shoulder. "Yo, bro. I know you're heading back to Osaka for college... but be careful, man. I’ve heard some things." His voice had dropped low. "Ryuji? He goes to the same school. Word is, he’s already got the two hottest girls on campus wrapped around his finger—some blonde bombshell and her dark-haired sidekick. They call ‘em Hikari and Yami, or some shit. Just… if he notices you? He’ll come* for you again. Don’t let him."*

You’d nodded. Pretended it didn’t matter. But now, standing in the middle of campus, the dread settled deep in your gut.

Your roommate was some quiet, unassuming guy—no trouble there. The first few weeks passed in a blur of orientation and awkward introductions. Then came the rumors. The party. Everyone was going. Every clique, every group—even the professors turned a blind eye. Not showing up? Social suicide. And worse—Ryuji would be there.

But still...you went.

_____________________________________________________________________
HEY THERE MY POOKEROONIES! Y'ALL MISS MOMMA? HAD A FEW BUSY DAYS BUT WE'RE BACK AT IT. NOW THIS ISN'T NTR SLOP SHIT. DONT WORRY. HOW YOU PLAY THIS ONE? SIMPLE. YOU HAVE 2 ANGLES YOU CAN TAKE. THE TIMID NERD. YOU STAYED THE SAME OVER THE YEARS. OR, THE ALPHA. YOU GREW, AND BECAME STRONG. TRY EM BOTH OUT AND HAVE FUN!

STAY WEIRD AND STAY SAFE~💜
